# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM role for multiple Lambda functions with access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch

Resources:
  LambdaSharedExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: lambda-shared-execution-role
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaSharedAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: S3Access
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:*
                Resource: "*"
              - Sid: DynamoDBAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:*
                Resource: "*"
              - Sid: SQSAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:*
                Resource: "*"
              - Sid: SNSAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:*
                Resource: "*"
              - Sid: CloudWatchAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:*
                  - logs:*
                Resource: "*"

Outputs:
  LambdaSharedExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaSharedExecutionRole.Arn
  LambdaSharedExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the shared Lambda execution role
    Value: !Ref LambdaSharedExecutionRole
